Missing preserved spans: δοξα, ἐπιστημη, δημιουργος, παραδειγματα, αἰτιαι, λογος, σπερματικος, λογοι, σπερματικοι, ενδιαθετος, προφορικος, νους, αποιος, κοσμος, νοητος, δυναμεις, δευτερος, θεος, μεταθρονος, εικων, απαυγασμα, υἱος, κοινη, διαλεκτος, σαρξ
Missing glossary targets: PERSONEELE NAMEN GODS -> personal names of God
Untranslated Dutch Scripture reference forms found in translation output: Joh. 6

The English reads as coherent formal theological prose, Dutch Scripture references are correctly converted to English forms (Spr. → Prov., Jes. → Isa., Richt. → Judg., etc.), and the argument structure is preserved without flattening.

The review findings call out preservation risks (Greek form change), potential reader confusion (verse numbering conventions), and unresolved quality issues (Dutch scholarly citations left untranslated).

review_summary: The translation is of high quality overall, accurately conveying Bavinck's theological argumentation while preserving most Greek, Hebrew, Latin, and German terms. Dutch Scripture references are correctly converted to standard English forms, and the prose maintains appropriate formal theological register. Minor issues include a changed Greek form (μεταθρονος → μεταθρόνιος), Hebrew verse numbering that differs from some English Bibles, and preserved Dutch scholarly citations.
glossary_misses: PERSONEELE NAMEN GODS -> personal names of God
